verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The anointing will break every bandage, The anointing will set the spirit free, The anointing will heal and deliver, Let the anointing, let flow all through me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Anointing fall on me, Anointing fall on me, Let the power Of the Holy Ghost, Fall on me, Anointing fall on me.
